hero.title: Packers & Movers in Hyderabad
hero.subtitle: HITEC City to Old City, Gachibowli to Kukatpally — 1,100+ verified movers.

intro:
Hyderabad blends old charm with tech-city energy. Radhe packers and movers gives you access to 1,100+ verified packers and movers across the city — HITEC City, Gachibowli, Kondapur, Jubilee Hills, Banjara Hills, Kukatpally, Miyapur and more.

Instant quotes, transparent pricing, and vendors that handle everything from heritage homes to modern high-rises.
whyUs: From the Old City's narrow lanes to HITEC City's high-rises, Hyderabad demands versatile movers. Our vendors have the right vehicles, the right crew, and the right gear — with ₹5 lakh damage protection and live GPS tracking on every move.

faqs.q: How much do packers charge in Hyderabad?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves from ₹4,500. 2 BHK moves within the city typically ₹7,500 – ₹13,500.

faqs.q: Do you cover HITEC City and Gachibowli?
faqs.a: Yes, along with all of GHMC including Jubilee Hills, Banjara Hills, Kondapur, Madhapur, Kukatpally, Secunderabad and more.

faqs.q: Can you move large wardrobes and beds?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors dismantle, pack, transport and reassemble furniture at transparent rates.
Yes, subject to vendor availability. Booking 24 hours in advance is recommended.
